ctxMarket: Attention is focused on Solana’s ecosystem rebound, driven by tokenized stock trading and notable gains in related tokens. Despite SOL reclaiming $72, onchain data points to weakening momentum, with declining TVL and DEX volumes.
ctxTalking:
• Jito’s $1.75B revenue milestone and its link to recent price action
• Solana ecosystem tokens and tokenized stock trading fueling a sector-wide rebound
• MoneyGram joining Solana as an infrastructure partner and validator
ctxMatters: Jito’s revenue highlights the scale of Solana-based protocols and their impact on token narratives. The surge in tokenized stock trading is spotlighting Solana’s use cases beyond DeFi, even as core metrics like TVL soften. MoneyGram’s integration signals ongoing institutional interest in Solana infrastructure.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Growth in tokenized stock trading and major partnerships like MoneyGram are shaping Solana’s narrative.
Noise: Short-term price spikes without supporting onchain activity may not reflect sustained momentum.
ctxGlossary:
TVL — Total Value Locked; a measure of assets deposited in DeFi protocols.
Validator — A network participant that helps secure and validate transactions on a blockchain.

readMore.title: Jito hits $1.75B revenue milestone, but what does this mean for its price rally?
SOL reclaims $72, but onchain data flags weakening momentum
Aave, Solana ecosystem tokens lead crypto rebound as bitcoin steadies near $60,000
